name: Subscription
description: Pub/sub topic and capability subscription starbridge-app.

deos.mount: register_deos (src/lib.rs) — folds the composed DeosApp into the StarbridgeAppContext affordance registry; DeosApp::mount yields the axum router
deos.publish: Signature (the feed cell is a dregg:// sturdyref a peer on another federation reacquires)

affordances.view_feed: cap-only, Signature (a CONSUMER reads the head-of-queue)
affordances.grant_publisher: cap-only, None/root (the OWNER admits a publisher)
affordances.grant_consumer: cap-only, None/root (the OWNER admits a consumer)
affordances.publish: GATED (cap∧state), Either — configured precondition (CAPACITY>=1); the fire submits the FULL delivery (head + message_root + latest_payload), the executor re-enforcing Monotonic(SEQ_HEAD)
affordances.consume: GATED (cap∧state), Signature — pending precondition (tail<head); the fire submits the FULL draw, the executor re-enforcing FieldLteField(tail<=head)

deos.seam: CLOSED — the fire runs against the seeded feed cell carrying the queue invariants (WriteOnce capacity/owner + Monotonic head/tail + FieldLteField(tail<=head)), so a STALE delivery (head not advancing) and an OVER-DRAW (tail past head) BITE in the deos fire path (tests/deos_seam.rs)
